docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER ABOURAMADAN, TAHA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER ABOURAMADAN, TAHA
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER ABOURAMADAN, TAHA

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-11-2014 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER TAHA ABOURAMADAN'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER ABOURAMADAN, TAHA HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER ABOURAMADAN, TAHA HEARING SET FOR JUN-12-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAY-28-2014 IN DEPT. 206, TAHA ABOURAMADAN'S HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES CONTINUED FROM MAY-28-2014 TO JUN-11-2014, 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 AT THE REQUEST OF THE APPLICANT. (206)
PROOF OF PUBLICATION (THE RECORDER) OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME CONTINUED TO DEC-04-2014 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514, AT THE REQUEST OF THE PETITIONER AND APPROVAL OF THE COURT. (514)

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME CONTINUED TO SEP-09-2014 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514. PETITIONER TAHA ABOURAMADAN APPEARING ON HIS OWN BEHALF. PROOF OF PUBLICATION ON FILE. COURT ORDERED PETITIONER TO FILE CERTIFIED RECORD FROM THE COURT IN REFERENCE TO THE COURT MATTERS PENDING IN WEST COVINA ON OR BEFORE 8/30/2014 WITH COURTESY COPIES OF THIS DOCUMENTS DELIVERED DIRECTLY TO DEPARTMENT 514. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MITCH LYON , CSR#6840. (514)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PETITIONER ABOURAMADAN, TAHA
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME OFF CALENDAR. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MITCH LYON , CSR#6840. (514)

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME CONTINUED TO NOV-06-2014 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514 AT THE REQUEST OF THE PETITIONER'S TELEPHONE REQUEST. PETITIONER TO COMPLY WITH THE SUBMISSION OF THE DOCUMENTATION IN REFERENCE TO THE COURT MATTERS PENDING IN WEST COVINA. COURT MADE THIS ORDER IN OPEN COURT AT THE PREVIOUS HEARING ON JUNE 12, 2014. PETITIONER WAS PRESENT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MILES LENDWAY, CSR#13684. (514)
